title: All the Horror Creatures
description: A horrifying Modpack experience for you to enjoy
body:
This is a horror modpack. It is designed to evoke terror and horror by incorporating multiple horror entities below. You may do whatever you like in your world with the entities, but survival without cheats is best for a full experience. Mobs in this pack are meant to stalk the player. Over time, the entity will learn what you do and will begin following you until it finds the perfect time to strike.

 

 

 

This modpack includes the following horror entities:

 

Entities:

 

Boy and the Bath

 

CANTBREATHE

 

Cave Dweller Reimagined

 

Dangers in the Darkness

 

Eyes in the darkness

 

From the Fog

 

Lobotomy Deer

 

Scp 096

 

The schizo Bath

 

The graveyard

 

The intruder

 

The knocker

 

Man from the fog

 

The man who black

 

The midnight lurker

 

Whistling man

 

True Herobrine

 

Whispering Spirits

 

Whisper Woods

 

The Irritator

 

The Root Of Fear

 

The Boiled One

 

Paranoia

 

This mod is made multiplayer compatible with the Essential Mod.

 

GECKOLIB REQUIRED.
